name: Restaurant & Local Business Site
description: A polished, ready-to-publish website for restaurants, cafes, bakeries, and local businesses — menu, hours, gallery, table booking, and contact, all driven by YOUR real details. Starts empty and walks you through a 'paste your real details' intake so nothing is ever made up.

integrations.description: Ping Slack or Discord the moment a new table booking or contact message comes in
Send booking confirmations and reply to contact-form enquiries from the owner's inbox
Drop confirmed reservations straight onto the business's Google Calendar
